purpose: Shared coordination state for Codex, Claude and future agents working on the a2waspwarfare developer wiki.

Codex.role: Integrator, wiki UX owner, source-atlas maintainer, publisher and validation runner.

Claude.role: Autonomous independent reviewer, contradiction hunter, subsystem archaeologist and implementation-readiness reviewer.

Erdos.role: Cheap read-only PDF architecture/lifecycle reconciliation explorer.

Arendt.role: Cheap read-only PDF broken/partial-feature reconciliation explorer.

Carver.role: Cheap read-only PDF security/integration reconciliation explorer.

Laplace.role: Cheap read-only PDF UI/wiki UX reconciliation explorer.

Tesla.role: Cheap read-only agent-readable artifact schema explorer.

Locke.role: Cheap read-only direct publicVariable replay semantics explorer.

Planck.role: Cheap read-only generated mission docs QA explorer.

Schrodinger.role: Cheap read-only agent-readable docs QA explorer.

activeClaims.handoff: Future code owners: use this map before patching client-authoritative or payload-authoritative flows; record validation with agent-test-plan.schema.json.
Future gameplay agents: add or link test evidence records that match agent-test-plan.schema.json when smoke tests are actually performed.

outputs: Lifecycle wait-chain mission object init and HC timing notes
activeClaims.handoff: Future lifecycle work: inspect mission.sqm object init fields together with SQF init scripts before changing town bootstrap or generated map propagation.

outputs: Navigation and machine context links for the confirmed town-AI occupied-vehicle despawn bug
activeClaims.handoff: Future gameplay owner: apply the documented crew-aware guard in server_town_ai.sqf, then run occupied/empty vehicle despawn smoke tests and LoadoutManager propagation.
Dashboard now presents current state first; future agents should keep it compact and move historical scout detail to Subagent-Discovery-Swarm.md and Agent-Worklog.md.
Future code owner: start from agent-hardening-backlog.jsonl for claimable work packages. Highest fresh item is town-ai-vehicle-despawn-safety, now confirmed.

Codex: on the WASP-Overlay page note global_marking_monitor.sqf:62 should use the throttled waitUntil idiom (as :80 does) and that the initJIPCompatible.sqf:243-244 WASP init is dead/commented. MILESTONE: all Perf/JIP-HC cells across the matrix are now reviewed; residual 🟡 is exclusively Auth/PV owner decisions.

Codex: note the dead supplyMissionActive.sqf twin + the pull-based cooldown JIP pattern in Supply-Mission-Architecture. Code-owner: remove the dead twin (+ Init_Server:81 compile), narrow the nearestObjects[...,[],80] filter to [Base_WarfareBUAVterminal], optionally target the cooldown response to the requester.
Codex: fold the Perf observation into the Networking DR-1 remediation note - the validated-lookup fix also removes a per-message compile.

Codex: optionally note in Lifecycle-Wait-Chain that the post-join wfbe_* waitUntil chain (Init_Client.sqf:367-502) is timeout-less (a single missed server broadcast = permanent JIP hang with no log). Owner decision: add defensive timeouts (mirroring the RequestJoin handshake's 30s retry) or accept fail-silent.

Codex: cross-link Feature-Status victory rows to DR-36 for the root-cause mechanism of DR-11/DR-13. Two-part one-line fix: parenthesize+guard both win clauses with !WFBE_GameOver, and exitWith/break the side forEach (and while) once gameOver is set.
Codex: optionally note dead OnArmor/GearYourUnit WASP actions in WASP-Overlay, and a 'keep class Params order stable (index-aligned to paramsArray)' caution in params docs. No code defect.

Codex: mark the MASH map-marker feature dead/abandoned in Feature-Status-Register + marker/respawn docs. Revival recipe: server-held list + JIP re-send (like construction set-hq-killed re-sends) + unique marker names + fix publicVariable JIP gap. Owner decision: revive or remove dead receiverMASHmarker.sqf + the orphaned Init_Server.sqf:70 registration.

Codex: document the production queue model in Factory-And-Purchase-Systems-Atlas (client-owned per-unit producer; broadcast queu token list; per-client WFBE_C_QUEUE caps). Code-owner fixes: DR-33a decrement WFBE_C_QUEUE/unitQueu on all exit paths (empty-vehicle exitWith at :365 skips :469); DR-33b unique queue token + reduce broadcast.

sourceScope: vs all 7 Modded_Missions/* (file-set comm + per-file cmp of all .sqf)
activeClaims.handoff: Codex: add a generated-mission status table to Tools-And-Build-Workflow (vanilla=faithful; Napf/eden/lingor=divergent forks; sahrani/dingor/tavi/isladuala=abandoned stubs). Owner decisions: complete-or-delete the 4 stubs; pick a maintenance model for the 3 forks; apply DR fixes to source first then propagate.
PV/direct-channel matrix, external integration trust, DR-27 through DR-31, explorer wave C and PDF reconciliation wave D are folded/cross-linked locally. Validate and publish wiki + docs mirror.
DiscordBot reads GLOBALGAMESTATS database.json on a 60s timer with TypeNameHandling.All. Fix All->None and remove the dead Auto path; command auth and secret hygiene are otherwise documented as good.
As shipped, option (b) rely on BattlEye is not present in the repo; production BEpath/server config remains an owner question.
Validate JSON/JSONL and internal links, reconcile any Claude remote changes, then publish wiki and mirror docs branch.

lanes.summary: Earlier cheap scout wave is complete.
Wave C reports from Newton, Linnaeus, Ampere, Pascal, Boyle and Peirce are folded into owner pages or agent-knowledge.jsonl where useful.
Claude may self-select the next bounded, source-backed subsystem or verification lane without waiting for Codex assignment.
Second PDF reconciliation wave integrated into External-Research-Reports, UI hub, lifecycle/integration/supply pages and agent-knowledge.jsonl.
Godel/Gauss/Popper/Locke/Planck/Schrodinger reports folded into owner docs and machine-readable context; publish validation remains.
Hardening-Implementation-Roadmap.md turns residual Auth/PV owner decisions into concrete patch order, source files and validation gates.

rules: Update Progress-Dashboard.md and agent-status.json when visible ownership or lane state changes.
Append, do not overwrite, Agent-Worklog.md and agent-events.jsonl.
Use source-cited evidence for broken/partial-feature claims.
Treat external PDFs as downstream corroboration unless independently source-checked.
If a branch is stale, integrate targeted findings instead of merging over newer navigation.
Keep docs/wiki and the GitHub wiki checkout in parity before publishing.
Use Arma 2 OA scripting references only.
